contentList.content: Grants unlimited Fire Bolt and Scorching Ray spells.
This ring grants its wearer proficiency in all armors and weapons. Profiency boosts are not visible on item description.
This ring grants its wearer star athlete's level skills and abilities.
No action cost, no spell slot cost and no requirements.
No action cost, no spell slot cost and no requirements.
Superior spell. Spell strength massively increased. No spell slot cost. This spell has no effect on Undead or Constructs.

A ring crackling with arcane force. Grants powerful spectral magic including Misty Step, Magic Missile, Shield, Counterspell, Hold Person, Knock, Globe of Invulnerability, Artistry of War, Invisibility, and Arcane Gate.
Unlimited Level 3 Magic Missile as a bonus action.
Globe of Invulnerability. Recharges on short rest.
Unlimited casting from Ring of Spectral Power.

A ring infused with protective energy. Grants Superior Healing Word, Bless, Create Water, Lesser Restoration, Greater Restoration, Freedom of Movement, Counterspell, Heroes' Feast, Remove Curse, Revivify, and Mass Healing Word.
Unlimited Shield as a bonus action.
Unlimited Counterspell as a bonus action.
Unlimited Hold Person as a bonus action.
Artistry of War. Once per short rest.
Unlimited Knock as a bonus action.
Arcane Gate. Recharges on short rest.
Unlimited Create Water as a bonus action.
Lesser Restoration. Recharges on short rest.
Greater Restoration. Recharges on long rest.
Freedom of Movement. Recharges on short rest.
Heroes' Feast. Recharges on long rest.

A legendary staff imbued with the essence of the Weave itself. Grants Chromatic Attunement, Arcane Enchantment, Arcane Battery, Spell Slot Restoration, Pearlescent Restoration, Mystra's Grace, Weave's Reclamation, Echoes of Netheril, and unlimited Shield and Counterspell reactions.
Legendary boots that combine the power of storms with shadowstep magic. Grants Misty Step, applies Reverberation when inflicting conditions, and provides immunity to web and terrain effects.
A circlet worn by archmages of old. Grants Dauntless (immunity to Frightened), Speak with Dead, and Speak with Animals.

A quarterstaff crackling with arcane energy. Grants Lightning Charges when casting spells at close range, Chromatic Attunement, Arcane Enchantment, Arcane Battery, Spell Slot Restoration, Pearlescent Restoration, Mystra's Grace, Weave's Reclamation, Echoes of Netheril, unlimited Light, unlimited Shield and Counterspell reactions, unlimited Celestial Haste, Akitaro's Blast, Akitaro's Teleport, Akitaro's Barrage, and Akitaro's Shield.
An exact copy of the Spellsparkler for testing purposes.
Artistry of War. Once per short rest.
Misty Step. Once per short rest.
Magic Missile level 3. Once per short rest.
Globe of Invulnerability. Once per short rest.
A cloak blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants unlimited Crusader's Mantle and divine physical prowess (Strength 24, Constitution 21, Dexterity 21).
A silver longsword blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants Wrathful Smite, Soulbreaker, and unlimited Blinding Smite.
A shield blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants Reflective Shell, Warding Bond, Shield Riposte, Spellguard, and unlimited Shield spell.

A helmet blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants Balduran's Vitality, Balduran's Protection, Stun/Fear/Blind Immunity, Critical Hit Immunity, HP Regeneration, Darkvision, and the spells Speak with Dead, Speak with Animals, See Invisibility, Protection From Evil And Good, and Faerie Fire.
Gloves blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Inflicts Radiating Orb when dealing Radiant damage and grants Tyr's Thunder (Thunderwave).

Half plate armor blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants +2 to all saving throws, allows full Dexterity bonus to AC, unlimited Celestial Haste, unlimited Misty Step, and unlimited Spirit Guardians.

A circlet blessed by Tyr, the God of Justice. Grants Balduran's Vitality, Balduran's Protection, Stun/Fear/Blind Immunity, Critical Hit Immunity, HP Regeneration, Darkvision, and the spells Speak with Dead, Speak with Animals, See Invisibility, Protection From Evil And Good, and Faerie Fire.
Call forth spirits to protect you. Nearby enemies take 3d8 Radiant or Necrotic damage. Unlimited casting.
Radiant spirits surround you. Unlimited casting.
Necrotic spirits surround you. Unlimited casting.
